pi_items.source: setup_task.sh queries OpenClinica DB for study with unique_identifier = 'DM-TRIAL-2024'
setup_task.sh explicitly creates Boston Clinic site with unique_identifier = 'DM-BOS-001'
setup_task.sh explicitly inserts study_subject with label = 'DM-101'
verifier.py and export_result.sh check for the reassigned study_subject with label = 'BOS-101'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data within the OpenClinica database. Setup scripts explicitly verify or inject the parent study ('DM-TRIAL-2024'), the target site identifier ('DM-BOS-001'), the initial subject ID ('DM-101'), and the expected new subject ID after reassignment ('BOS-101'). All metadata claims exactly match the database queries and validation logic in the setup and verification scripts.
